<!-- Shortcuts and links used throughout the documentation -->

<!--Links to software tools, etc., that we reference -->
[MIT License]:                  https://opensource.org/license/mit
[Pandoc]:                       https://pandoc.org
[Quarto]:                       https://quarto.org
[repo]:                         https://github.com/nessan/cmake
[docs]:                         https://nessan.github.io/cmake
[email]:                        mailto:nzznfitz+gh@icloud.com

<!-- Formatted links to pages for external items -->
[`CMake`]:                      https://cmake.org/documentation
[module]:                       https://cmake.org/cmake/help/book/mastering-cmake/chapter/Modules.html
[`FetchContent`]:               https://cmake.org/cmake/help/latest/module/FetchContent.html
[`EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL`]:           https://cmake.org/cmake/help/latest/prop_tgt/EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL.html
[`CPM`]:                        https://github.com/cpm-cmake/CPM.cmake

<!-- Formatted links to all the module pages -->
[`add_archive`]:                /pages/add_archive.qmd
[`add_executables`]:            /pages/add_executables.qmd
[`compiler_init`]:              /pages/compiler_init.qmd
[`disable_in_source_builds`]:   /pages/disable_in_source_builds.qmd
[`fetch_content`]:              /pages/fetch_content.qmd
[`systematize`]:                /pages/systematize.qmd
